https://www.defensenews.com/global/2026/: KNDS wins CAESAR 6x6 order for Nigeria. The Franco-German group KNDS (formerly Nexter) has signed a contract for the delivery of 18 CAESAR 6x6 155mm artillery systems to Nigeria. The contract, worth approximately 120 million dollars, includes training and logistical support. The CAESAR is a 155mm/52-calibre self-propelled gun mounted on a truck. This order strengthens KNDS's presence in the African artillery market. First deliveries are expected in 2027. Nigeria thus becomes a new export customer for the French artillery system.
